 (
 select CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,ORG_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES_ALL
 minus
 select CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,ORG_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES_ALL 
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID = STG_CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES_ALL.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID and ACM.ORG_ID=STG_CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES_ALL)
